UserComments.Comment: Used again,twice this week,always excelent,free full 16A Schuko socket,nearby pubs & coffee shops always allowed me to use toilet for free,i love this place.

With a large or wide vehicle U may have troubles with docking,for smaller EVs this is the best charging station in this town.Mennekes is mostly busy,but Schuko socket is free of charge & offers full current-max.for 1-phase sockets=16A,which is very rare for free sockets,I know only about 2 such places in Österreich. Many shops in place,1 of them allows using their toilet for free also for those,who r not their customers. Live long & prosper.

AddressInfo.Title: Oberer Markt
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Only 1 full-size parking place(mostly in use by a local vehicle)+1 compact parking place-sufficient for small cars as Citroën C0/Mitsubishi iMiEV/Peugeot iOn,but normally wide car will not fit,I advise to have an extension cord onboard.

Connections.Comments: Almost always in use by a local Renault Zoe of a wine-company,probably it has a priority access.

GeneralComments: Nearby bakery allows using of their toilets for free,even U do not buy anything there,very nice place.
